3156210.name: Gelecard: Guerreiros Gelatinosos
3156210.description:
DEMO

Currently, our game is in Demo, offering just a preview of what's to come! For now, you can dive into multiplayer mode and face off against other MASTERS of Gelecard in strategic battles.

We are working hard to align the codes - or rather, the cosmos - to bring you the full game experience. In the meantime, have fun learning the mechanics, testing strategies, and discovering the potential of the GODS OF DESTRUCTION (cute slimes).

We appreciate your patience and support as we prepare everything to ensure you have the best adventure in Gelecard. Stay tuned, because the universe of gelatinous warriors is just getting started!

ABOUT

Prepare your decks, choose your hero, and embark on an epic journey!

Cotia, the adventurer, is on a mission to become the greatest Gelecard player IN THE WORLD! Traveling to every corner of Geleterra, he gathers a group of allies as eccentric as he is. But will our hero be able to take on the greatest champions of Gelecard, even when they don’t play fair 😨?

WIN USING CUTE SLIMES!

With over 50 cards to collect, every battle in Gelecard is a fusion of strategy and creativity! Play INFINITE cards per turn, as long as you have enough cards and mana, and unleash devastating fire attacks and spells that will leave your opponents shaking as if they’ve been hit by an earthquake!

At the start of each new turn, your hand is refilled, bringing new opportunities. And if luck isn’t on your side? DESTROY cards to ensure the perfect hand in the next turn!

And don’t be fooled by the slimes’ adorable appearance—these gelatinous warriors may hide COSMIC powers! Get ready to face cute but extremely powerful creatures that will challenge even the most seasoned strategists.

PLAY YOUR WAY!

Discover spells and use the 5 types of slimes to create unique and powerful decks. Explore a world where every area holds secrets in hidden locations—there’s always something new to uncover.

Plus, chat with the characters you meet along the way. Each one has a story to tell and might offer valuable tips 😉. Pay attention to the dialogues—they could be the key to your victory!

BUILD YOUR TEAM OF HEROES

Throughout your journey, you’ll encounter quirky allies who will join you in your IMPOSSIBLE quest (well, almost impossible, actually).

Prove that you are worthy of receiving their cards. After all, some allies you meet come with an entire set of card types for you to use in your decks, and you’ll need them to unlock your full potential in battle.

MULTIPLAYER: CHALLENGE OTHER MASTERS OF GELECARD!

Connect to other realms and face versions of your allies—or even another version of YOURSELF! In multiplayer mode, you’ll be able to duel against other players who have overcome the same challenges as you, but with strategies that will surprise you.

Are your tactics truly unbeatable? Find out by facing real opponents who think outside the box and create decks you’ve never imagined. Every match is a new opportunity to test your skills and learn from the best!

Get ready for battles with your strongest deck—creativity and strategy are just as important as luck. Who will be the true best Gelecard player?

GELECARD: GUERREIROS GELATINOSOS

"In distant lands, there was a curious tradition,
Where wars and conflicts met a swift rendition.

No blood was spilled, for a more intriguing feat,
No matter your race or style, all warriors would meet.

Adventurers, fighters, assassins of low esteem,
Gathered in a cozy tavern, where the barrels would scream.

There, they prepared with care, for this was a game of wit,
No axes or swords, no, this was the time for slime to commit.

So ready your deck and come face me in play,
For another round of Gelecard is underway!"

Made with lots of love, Gelecard is a tribute to the card games that marked our childhood. We want you to feel the same excitement and joy we felt while playing.

Explore the incredible world of Geleterra, master the mechanics of the slimes, and have fun in an adventure that blends strategy, humor, and loads of cuteness. We’re thrilled to share this world with you!
3156210.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
